ops.body: Round shipped as v0.9.0 (tag on fb3c2664, release run 29299460301 success, 9 assets, Homebrew cask pushed). 15 commits: host API v2 (floor versioning, ui.tokens/toast/usePackState/context, survey reference pack), Blue Pencil identity end to end (foundation, marks, content blocks, lifecycle), CLI ergonomics, iOS palette+receipts, docs. Review: codex finder(15)+refuter(6) passes, 18 accepted findings fixed across two fix waves; E2E QA A-I all pass. Wire contract byte-identical (conformance corpus untouched). Local plugin cache updated 0.8.1→0.9.0.
